nasb.text: Thus you are different from those women in your harlotries, in that no one plays the harlot as you do, because you give money and no money is given you; thus you are different.”

esv.text: So you were different from other women in your whorings. No one solicited you to play the whore, and you gave payment, while no payment was given to you; therefore you were different.

cnv.text: 你的淫行與別的婦女不同，因為不是人把禮物送給你，要求與你行淫，是你把禮物送給人，所以你是不同的。

ccb.text: 你卖淫不同于别的妓女，没有人给你淫资，你倒贴钱给人，你真是与众不同。
